zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
以太坊当前处于高位窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕1715一线运行，多空暂时均衡，但短线偏强结构上维持上升后整理形态多头优势未破坏

MACD维持正值18.9附近，动能仍偏多但缺乏加速，均线SMA20上移支撑价格结构RSI缺失暂以震荡判断指标共振偏向中性略多

上方阻力关注1718.98及1725一线，下方支撑1711.85与1697附近SMA20构成防线区间内波动为主突破前需确认量能

短线建议高抛低吸为主，未有效突破前避免追涨，关注1718突破情况决定方向控制仓位防止假突破保持纪律交易等待区间确认信号再入场稳健优先

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating in a tight range around 1715 USD, showing minimal volatility with a 24-hour change of 0.15%. The price remains slightly above the 20-period SMA at 1697, suggesting a mild bullish bias despite short-term indecision. The narrow daily range between 1711 and 1718 indicates equilibrium between buyers and sellers after a recent upward move. Market structure still favors accumulation above key moving support.

MACD reading at 18.92 indicates positive momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits full crossover confirmation. This suggests that bullish pressure is present but not strongly accelerating. With RSI unavailable, price action becomes more important, and current stability above the SMA(20) reinforces a neutral-to-bullish structure. Momentum appears steady rather than expanding, pointing to consolidation rather than breakout conditions.

Immediate support is located at 1711 USD, aligning closely with the lower boundary of the current daily range. Below this, the 1697 SMA(20) acts as a stronger dynamic support zone. On the upside, resistance is seen at 1718, with a potential extension toward 1735 if bullish momentum expands. The current structure suggests a compression phase before directional expansion. Volatility contraction often precedes sharper directional moves.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies may remain effective while price holds between 1711 and 1718. Short-term traders can consider buying near support with tight risk controls, targeting the upper resistance zone. A confirmed breakout above 1718 could justify momentum long positions toward 1735. Conversely, a breakdown below 1697 would weaken bullish structure and open downside risk. Patience is key until a clear breakout signal emerges.
